feed.title: Node Security
feed.subtitle: Security and programming blog containing guides and examples of how to do various penetration testing and programming related tasks.

entry.title: List Comparer
entry.summary: A List Comparer that accepts two separate lists and shows you the intersection, differences, and union (overlap). Trailing whitespace and empty lines will be removed during comparison. ALL processing is done client-side using JavaScript. No data is sent to any server nor stored in local or session storage. List A List B Output In A AND B (Union) In A but NOT in B (Difference) In B b...

entry.title: Nmap Output Parser
entry.summary: Basic Nmap output parser that will group all the hosts for each port together so you can easily see all the hosts for each port. This is the reverse format the output is stored in. Instead of seeing the open ports for a host, you’ll see a host list for each open port. ALL processing is done client-side using JavaScript. No data is sent to any server nor stored in local or session storage. ...

entry.title: PDF Combiner
entry.summary: Simple client-side PDF document combiner that allows multiple PDF files to be combined into a single PDF file. All processing is done client-side using pdf-lib.js Upload PDF Combine Name Pages Size Order

entry.title: JSON Parse & Filter
entry.summary: A simple JSON parser and that acts like jq and can be used in the browser. ALL processing is done client-side using JavaScript. No data is sent to any server nor stored in local or session storage. JSON Input Beautify Filter Expression Filtered Output Copy output to Clipboard Functions Supported String.parseInt() can be called on Strings to convert a value to a Integer. Stri...

entry.title: Password Word List Generator
entry.summary: Tool for generating a word list of password candidates based off of a seed word. The output list can be used as a word list in tools like hashcat with rules to crack hashes. All processing is done client-side via JavaScript. Input Word(s) Multiple words may be entered on separate lines. Results
